title: Dedicated Server LAN Pinger (DSLP)
description: 📡 Makes the dedicated server broadcast its presence on LAN so you can find it easier.
body: # Dedicated Server LAN Pinger (DSLP) DSLP makes the server broadcast its presence on LAN, so you can find it easier. It is **server-side only**, clients do not need this mod installed. ![Server List with a LAN server and a Regular Server on it](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/eGK7q0RC/images/d8e887e46fbdfa3b19845ed32304174f6053172f.png) There are no plans to port it to Forge/NeoForge.
